name: le-data-quality
description: Audits contacts and companies for missing critical fields and broken relationships. Generates a CRM health score.

checks.label: Contacts missing email
checks.why: Contacts without email can't be sequenced, emailed, or reliably deduplicated. They break routing rules and pollute segment counts.
checks.fix: Add an email address to this contact

checks.label: Contacts missing first or last name
checks.why: Anonymous contacts can't be personalized in outreach and make attribution reporting unreliable.
checks.fix: Add a first name and last name to this contact

checks.label: Contacts with no company association
checks.why: Unassociated contacts break account-based reporting and prevent company-level scoring or routing.
checks.fix: Associate this contact with a company record

checks.label: Contacts missing job title
checks.why: Missing job title prevents persona-based segmentation and ICP scoring.
checks.fix: Add a job title to help with segmentation and routing

checks.label: Companies missing domain
checks.why: Domain is required for deduplication, enrichment, and email deliverability. Companies without a domain are invisible to most enrichment tools.
checks.fix: Add the company website domain — required for deduplication and enrichment

checks.label: Companies missing industry
checks.why: Industry is required for ICP segmentation, territory assignment, and vertical-specific routing.
checks.fix: Add industry to enable segmentation and reporting

checks.label: Companies with no associated contacts
checks.why: Ghost companies with no contacts distort account counts and inflate your total addressable market reporting.
checks.fix: Associate at least one contact with this company or archive it
